hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(production/|characters/|Season 1/).*\.json$' && npx tsx scripts/lint-content.ts 2>/dev/null || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'production/scripts/.*\.md$' && npx tsx scripts/lint-locations.ts "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
